summary: Iteration 10: Comprehensive rebuild testing - Professional TopNav with theme toggle, emerald+gold CSS theme, text overflow fixes. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend 24/24 pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: 403 error in console logs - external third-party API issue, non-blocking

issues: PermissionManager location modal appears on every page load - may be intentional UX but blocks testing

seed_data_creation: TEST_iter10 post created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified working: 1) TopNav shows on all pages except /, /auth, /admin with theme toggle icon (data-testid='theme-toggle-nav'), 2) Theme toggle cycles through auto/light/dark modes, 3) Home page has no TopNav (uses hero header), 4) More page has tools grid and theme setting with mode text (تلقائي/ليلي/نهاري), no floating toggle, 5) Sohba has 2-column masonry grid with real posts from backend, 6) Auth page has Google login + forgot password link, no TopNav, 7) Bottom nav has 5 tabs (الرئيسية, الصلاة, صُحبة, الرسائل, المزيد), 8) Emerald+gold CSS theme applied (hue 155 primary, hue 40 accent). PermissionManager location modal appears on pages.
mocked_apis_note: Forgot password doesn't actually send emails (placeholder). Sohba images use Unsplash placeholders.

topnav_visibility.home_page_no_topnav: ✅ Home (/) does NOT show TopNav - has own hero header
topnav_visibility.sohba_page_has_topnav: ✅ Sohba (/sohba) shows TopNav with theme toggle
topnav_visibility.more_page_has_topnav: ✅ More (/more) shows TopNav with theme toggle
topnav_visibility.auth_page_no_topnav: ✅ Auth (/auth) does NOT show TopNav - custom header

theme_toggle.cycles_modes: ✅ Toggle cycles through auto → light → dark → auto
theme_toggle.mode_display_in_more: ✅ More page shows current mode text (تلقائي/ليلي/نهاري)
theme_toggle.no_floating_toggle: ✅ No floating theme toggle button in More page

sohba_redesign.category_tabs: ✅ Category tabs: الكل, عام, القرآن الكريم, etc.

ui_screenshots: .screenshots/home_page.png - Home page with hero header (no TopNav)
.screenshots/more_page.png - More page with tools grid and theme setting
.screenshots/auth_page.png - Auth page with Google login and forgot password
